answer_en:
Pterion
A branch of the middle meningeal a. runs beneath the pterion (between the dura mater and the skull) and is vulnerable to injury at this point since the skull is both thin and weak
An injured middle meningeal a. is the most common cause of an extradural (epidural) hematoma
